sequential-thinking.description: Forces tree-of-thought reasoning before mutations — prevents greedy decoding errors on complex multi-step MAVIS tasks

context7.description: Precision doc injector — pulls version-pinned API signatures (Supabase, React, Vite) without blowing out the context window

supabase.description: Live schema inspection — catch column-name drift before generating SQL, verify migrations, debug RLS cascade issues in real-time

stagehand.description: Vision-aware headless browser — sees UI layouts, navigates SPAs without brittle CSS selectors, feeds screenshot feedback into the agent loop

n8n.description: Full n8n node catalog — agent constructs production-ready workflow JSON from natural language, not just triggers existing webhooks
